title: So far ahead. But, of course,
content:
So far ahead. But, of course,
Still seen as clear as at seventeen.
Tails of heads--ever fixed,
Separating dust and dirt. Never
Growing, never shrinking--depth,
proportion: Distant cousins;
If relatives at all--completely
Unmarried to speed fraught
By the lightness,
By the heaviness:
of my foot. No longer received:

Invitations, face times, mobile messages, signed
Notifications, fertilizations, opted terminations, family
Functions, family, profile access. By all means, lengths, straights, intent and/or otherwise: dead.
